query: SELECT p.id, p.name, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(p.images, '$[0]')) as imgUrl FROM products p WHERE p.establishmentId = 60018 AND p.images IS NOT NULL AND JSON_LENGTH(p.images) > 0 ORDER BY p.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(p.images, '$[0]')) as imgUrl FROM products p WHERE p.establishmentId = 60018 AND p.images IS NOT NULL AND JSON_LENGTH(p.images) > 0 ORDER BY p.id;
